title: Ring Around the Moon
writer: Vera Hobart, Vere Hobart, Paul Perez
actors: Donald Cook, Erin O'Brien-Moore, Alan Edwards
plot: (1936, Chesterfield) Donald Cook, Ann Doran, Erin Moore, Doug Fowley. Cook is a high-flying newspaperman who falls into an engagement to a lady he does not love. Lots of poverty row intrigue follows. Pretty much a straight drama w...
